text:
I've run the gitlab:doctor:secrets and get the following (see below). Maybe there's any method to regenerate secrets file?

I've migrate Gitlab to other FreeBSD server recently by installing it on new server following your instructions and overwrite config dir from old server. I think it's the cause of the problem ((
